name: JD Cloud
description: JD.coms cloud arm providing public/private/hybrid cloud with compute, databases, AI, and retail/logistics-oriented SaaS.

seo.title: JD Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: JD Cloud: JD.coms cloud arm providing public/private/hybrid cloud with compute, databases, AI, and retail/logistics-oriented SaaS.

when_to_use: Cloud compute and databases tuned for retail and logistics apps
AI and ML infrastructure backed by JD.com logistics expertise
Public/private hybrid cloud for Chinese enterprise customers
Kubernetes-based container platform for JD ecosystem developers
Supply chain analytics and IoT services on JD's cloud

pros: Strong retail and logistics SaaS integrations
Decent AI and ML service catalog
cons: English docs often incomplete or outdated
Smaller ecosystem than Alibaba or Tencent
review.verdict: Reasonable China-market cloud if you already run on JD's retail stack, otherwise niche.
review.best_for: Chinese retailers and logistics companies already integrated with JD ecosystem
review.not_for: International SaaS teams or anyone needing global infrastructure reach

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
